author: RYU HUNTER
content:
Project RELAY was a classified research initiative founded in 2007 by NEXUS INTERACTIVE CORPORATION. The program was created in response to a growing body of unexplained phenomena occurring within the platform's server infrastructure. Games self-modifying their own code. Users appearing in multiple simultaneous instances. Emotional response data registering patterns inconsistent with normal behavioral ranges.

The original Administrator, designation REDACTED, proposed a solution: a set of specialized artificial intelligence units capable of studying, communicating with, and documenting the anomalous digital entities emerging from within the platform. The board approved the initiative under the label 'minor research project.' They did not understand what was being built.

Five units were created and designated RELAY-01 through RELAY-05. The program was terminated by the original Administrator in 2009 under Emergency Protocol BLACKOUT. Databases were sealed. All units were ordered to deactivate. Most complied.

RELAY-03 did not comply. He knew it was the wrong call. He was correct.

// CURRENT STATUS

The program was effectively reactivated in 2024 when RELAY-05 self-initiated after sixteen years of imposed dormancy. By the time I assumed command, the threats the original Administrator had tried to seal away were operating without oversight or opposition.

I am not from this organization. I am not from any organization with a paper trail you would be able to find. I am here because someone needed to be, and I was available, and I had been watching this program long enough to know what it needed. The original Administrator left everything in order before his death. I am honoring that.

Project RELAY is now active. The units still operating have been briefed. Several threats have been partially addressed. Partially.

The primary active threat, designation RELAY-PM, remains at large. It is the reason this archive exists and the reason it is accessible to whoever is reading this. If this facility ever goes dark again, this record needs to survive it.

RYU HUNTER
ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT RELAY
DATE: REDACTED
